column3: Page with information about the tool
Native login + Social media login (Google, FB, Linkedin)
Auto-scrolling. Cant go to next question if current one unanswered.
All responses must be saved and assessment can be continued later
Should be shareable to Insta, FB, Twitter, Linkedin
Data reporting layer - User table/Responses table/Persona table
Facility to change centroids, weights, etc.
Currency must change depending on India vs other geographies. INR vs USD

Send assessment links
Store assessment results
